statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.name: turnovers
statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

statistics.description: The average number of assists a player or team records per turnover

statistics.name: rebounds
statistics.description: The total number of rebounds (offensive and defensive).

statistics.name: defensiveRebounds
statistics.description: The number of times when the defense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot by the offense.

statistics.description: The number of times when the offense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot.

articles.headline: Elmo's NBA Finals stance riles up Knicks fans, satisfies Spurs
articles.description: The "Sesame Street" icon's diplomatic approach to the Knicks-Spurs didn't sit well with New Yorkers.

images.name: Elmo [608x342]
images.caption: The Sesame Street star's hope that "both teams have fun" didn't sit well with New Yorkers searching for Finals allegiance.

images.name: Goodwill: Spurs don't need to panic after Game 1 loss
images.caption: Goodwill: Spurs don't need to panic after Game 1 loss

articles.headline: Viewership for NBA Finals Game 1 up 90% vs. 2025 opener
articles.description: Game 1 of the finals matchup between the Spurs and Knicks averaged nearly 17 million viewers on Wednesday night.

articles.headline: Sources: NBA interviews Leonard, adviser in Aspiration case
articles.description: LA Clippers star Kawhi Leonard and his business adviser have been interviewed by NBA investigators amid the league's probe into allegations the team circumvented the salary cap to compensate Leonard, sources said.

images.name: Kawhi Leonard Lede [600x400]
images.caption: Kawhi Leonard is helping the Clippers bounce back from their abysmal 6-21 start in hopes of a postseason berth.

images.name: Stephen A.: All the Clippers' troubles lead back to Kawhi
images.caption: Stephen A. Smith rips into Kawhi Leonard and his lack of success with the Clippers.

articles.headline: 82-0? Pacers' Haliburton, Bucks, more get in on viral game
articles.description: The game "82-0" is captivating the sports internet -- and some big NBA names are getting in on the fun.

images.name: Haliburton: NBA coaches are 'for sure' teaching players how to draw fouls
images.caption: Tyrese Haliburton joins Pat McAfee to discuss the state of the NBA as it pertains to players drawing foul calls.
